name: node-long
title: node-long
summary: Class for representing 64-bit two's-complement integer value
description:
Class for representing 64-bit two's-complement integer value
A Long class for representing a 64 bit two's-complement integer value
derived from the Closure Library for stand-alone use and extended with
unsigned support.
.
This is a class used by various modules that does not use newer bigint.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
